channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Large Pothole in road will cause a crash before long as cars trying to aviod, 3rd March
item.description:
Badgeworth road just opposite the turning to The Reddings
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Badgeworth Road, Badgeworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple holes on the bend heading towards Badgeworth, 3rd March
item.description:
On Badgeworth Road heading towards Badgeworth after the farm
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Badgeworth Road, Badgeworth, Tewkesbury

item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brookfield Road, Churchdown, Tewkesbury

item.title: Potholes getting bigger daily, 3rd March
item.description:
Just before the turning into Brookfield Lane
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brookfield Road, Churchdown, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large pot hole before Chosen hill school will cause a collision soon as cars are having to drive on teh other side of the road to get past this hole, 3rd March
item.description:
Bad pot hole needs fixing asap
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brookfield Road, Churchdown, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large series of potholes in carriageway, 3rd March
item.description:
The series of potholes are in the carriageway between the Meadow Way roundabout and the Co-op heading towards Hare & Hounds Traffic Lights. They cause a hazard to all road users but especially to vulnerable road users where a vehicle may naturally swerve to avoid them
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 45, Parton Road, Churchdown, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:

item.description:

item.title: The drain under the manhole cover as seen on the photo collects all the water running down the road and from the hills to the rear of the property which runs underground. The manhole has been checked with dye by your workers and apparently when it is unblocked allows the water to slowly escape via a small 4 inch pipe under the road to the soak away in the woodlands across the road. The 4 inch pipe needs to be bigger say 12 inch as it’s too small and is now completely blocked as it’s too small to cope., 3rd March
item.description:
Right outside Whitton Dean just in front of the wall to the property

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Charlton Abbots Road, Sudeley, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet
